array.string: launchctl setenv OPENAI_API_KEY $(security find-generic-password -w -s "OpenAI API Key" -a "API Keys") launchctl setenv AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK $(security find-generic-password -w -s "AWS Bedrock Bearer Token" -a "API Keys") launchctl setenv DEVREV_API_KEY $(security find-generic-password -w -s "DevRev API Key" -a "API Keys") launchctl setenv OPENCODE_ENABLE_EXA true launchctl setenv OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_LSP_TOOL true launchctl setenv OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_MARKDOWN true
